channel.title: Documentary on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Documentary on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: An Oscar-Winning Director Called the AI Economy a Ponzi Scheme. Is He Right?
item.description: The director of the Oscar-winning Navalny doc turned his camera on Silicon Valley. His new film argues the AI boom is an elaborate Ponzi scheme—and the question he asks is one the whole industry wants to dodge.
